Gísling recommends setting out to the east of Snowbourn in search of Fastred or any Orcs that he has slain in his wake. Gísling suggests that you try …
You have followed Fastred's trail of slaughter far into the Sutcrofts. He must be nearby. You should search for Fastred.
Fastred can be found near Dagred's grave to the west and slightly north of Snowbourn. You should deliver Gísling's message to Fastred.
